name: Feedback or idea
about: Share feedback, an improvement, or an idea for a pattern worth adding.
title: "[feedback] <topic>"
labels: ["feedback"]

## What is this about

<!-- A pattern that worked, something that did not, a gap in the schemas, an idea worth stealing. -->

## The detail

<!--
Be specific and founder-to-founder. If you are proposing a new pattern,
say what problem it solves and roughly how it works. No need to be polished.
-->

## What stack are you on (optional)

<!-- e.g. OpenClaw, Codex / OpenAI, Hermes, homegrown. Helps us keep advice framework-agnostic. -->
